nodes.name: Theme System Skill
nodes.description: JSON-based theme system for OpenChamber UI colors using theme tokens; SVG sprite-based icon system

nodes.name: Theme Color Tokens
nodes.description: Five token categories: surface (backgrounds/layers), interactive (clickable elements), status (feedback), primary (CTAs), syntax (code display)

nodes.name: Surface Color Tokens
nodes.description: surface.background (main app), surface.elevated (inputs/cards/panels), surface.muted (sidebars), surface.foreground (primary text), surface.mutedForeground (secondary text), surface.subtle (dividers)

nodes.name: Interactive Color Tokens
nodes.description: interactive.border (default borders), interactive.hover (clickable elements only), interactive.selection (active/selected), interactive.selectionForeground, interactive.focusRing

nodes.name: Status Color Tokens
nodes.description: status.error, status.warning, status.success, status.info each with Foreground, Background, Border variants

nodes.name: Primary Color Tokens
nodes.description: primary.base (CTA buttons), primary.hover (hover on primary), primary.foreground (text on primary background)

nodes.name: Syntax Color Tokens
nodes.description: syntax.base.background, syntax.base.foreground, syntax.base.keyword, syntax.base.string, syntax.highlights.diffAdded, syntax.highlights.diffRemoved (code display only)

nodes.name: SVG Sprite Icon System
nodes.description: SVG sprite-based icon system using shared Icon component; Remixicon naming converted to kebab-case; auto-generated sprite.ts

nodes.name: Built-in Themes Location
nodes.description: JSON theme files in packages/ui/src/lib/theme/themes/ with presets.ts registry, light/dark pairs per theme (e.g. flexoki-dark.json)

nodes.name: React UI Framework
nodes.description: React with TypeScript, function components + hooks, Vite bundler, Tailwind v4 styling

nodes.name: Tailwind v4 Styling
nodes.description: Tailwind CSS v4 for styling with CSS variables for theme tokens; typography via packages/ui/src/lib/typography.ts

nodes.name: UI Primitive Libraries
nodes.description: Base UI (@base-ui/react primary for dropdown/select/dialog/menu/tooltip), Radix UI (legacy migrating), HeroUI (package deps), Remixicon SVG sprite
